title: St. Leonards and St. Ives SSSI overhead line (JO/MILA E1L5 AHCP), S37 Consent, Electricity Act 1989
body: "Secretary of State’s screening decisions in accordance with the Electricity Works (Environmental Impact Assessment) (England and Wales) Regulations 2017.
